scenarios.name: baseline — swap + perp-short widgets both render

expected.notes: No execution; assert both legs mount (defi-swap-widget + defi-perp-short-widget) with their default inputs + ledger queryable.

scenarios.name: swap 90% capital from USDT to ETH (spot long)

expected.notes: Spot leg of the CARRY_BASIS_PERP archetype — spot long hedged by perp short.
Perp-short leg — completes the paired spot+perp SSOT flow per architecture-v2 (carry-basis-perp.md). Emits a TRADE row with data-trade-venue containing HYPERLIQUID.
Reactive-only scenario — no order placed. Tightening slippage reduces aggregate price impact.

scenarios.name: basis trade metrics surface when amount entered

expected.notes: Reactive-only — Funding APY / Cost of Carry / Net APY panel appears for basis-trade mode.

scenarios.name: second swap appends another SWAP row

expected.notes: Confirm ledger append is idempotent; multiple executes produce distinct rows.
